---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for gameplay, restore workflow, docs, or presentation
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in a short, practical way.

## Problem it solves

What is currently painful, unclear, or limited?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you want.

## System area

- [ ] Homepage / categories
- [ ] NES / FC
- [ ] GBA
- [ ] GB / GBC
- [ ] PS1
- [ ] MAME
- [ ] Pokemon VN
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] Import scripts
- [ ] Cover pipeline
- [ ] Restore / backup
- [ ] Documentation

## Risk / tradeoff

What could this affect?

- performance
- mobile UX
- database
- file layout
- runtime cores
- restore process

## Success criteria

How should we know the feature is done and working well?
